2024-04-06T18:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge, with details as shown below: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge are lowered from 100km/h to 50 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge is lowered from 80km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-04-06T18:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： (i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制由每小時100公里降至每小時50 公里；及 (ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制由每小時80公里降至每小時50 公里。

2024-04-06T22:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 100 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 80km/h.
2024-04-06T22:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下安排： (i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制恢復為每小時100公里；及 (ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制恢復為每小時80公里。

2024-04-08T11:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to a person on the track at Kowloon Tong Station, train service near Kowloon Tong Station on the East Rail Line has been suspended. Please consider using other transport.
2024-04-08T11:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於有人進入九龍塘站路軌範圍，東鐵綫九龍塘站附近的列車服務暫停，請考慮使用其他交通工具。

2024-04-08T11:40:00.CONTENT_EN:
Train service disruption on the East Rail Line due to a person on the track at Kowloon Tong Station. 
For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm.  A free MTR shuttle bus service is being arranged and should be operating at affected station(s) around 45 minutes after the rail service suspension, depending on road traffic conditions as it will take time to organize. 
Please consider using alternative MTR Lines or other transport. 
Passengers for Kowloon Tong Station are advised to take Kwun Tong Line.
2024-04-08T11:40:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於有人進入九龍塘站路軌範圍，東鐵綫列車服務受阻。
詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm。  港鐵免費接駁巴士將於稍後時間到達。鑑於調配車輛需時，並需視乎當時路面情況，我們會致力在列車服務局部中斷後約45分鐘於受影響車站為大家提供接駁巴士服務。請考慮使用港鐵其他綫路或其他交通工具。
前往九龍塘站的乘客，可考慮使用觀塘綫。

2024-04-08T11:55:00.CONTENT_EN:
Train service disruption on the East Rail Line due to a person on the track at Kowloon Tong Station. 
For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm.  A Free MTR shuttle bus service between Kowloon Tong Station and Tai Wai Station, is now operating. Please consider using alternative MTR Lines or other transport. 
Passengers for Kowloon Tong Station are advised to take Kwun Tong Line. 
Passengers are advised to interchange at Diamond Hill or Tai Wai Station for Tuen Ma Line.
2024-04-08T11:55:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於有人進入九龍塘站路軌範圍，東鐵綫列車服務受阻。
詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm。  港鐵正提供免費接駁巴士，來往九龍塘站和大圍站；請考慮使用港鐵其他綫路或其他交通工具。
前往九龍塘站的乘客，可考慮使用觀塘綫。
乘客可考慮於鑽石山或大圍站轉乘屯馬綫。
